title: Kamal Hinduja: How do I move a board from one workspace to another?
excerpt:
Hi, 
I am Kamal Hinduja based Geneva, Switzerland (Swiss).  Can anyone explain How to move a board from one workspace to another? 
Thanks, Regards 
Kamal Hinduja Geneva, Switzerland

posts.author: kamalhinduja (Kamal Hinduja)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am Kamal Hinduja based Geneva, Switzerland (Swiss). Can anyone explain How to move a board from one workspace to another?

Thanks, Regards

Kamal Hinduja Geneva, Switzerland

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Click on the three dots in the bar on the left for the board. Then choose Move to & Then Move to Workspace.
